summary: The US attacked military targets on Iran's main oil-export hub of Kharg Island over the weekend and threatened to expand strikes to energy infrastructure if Tehran interferes with Strait of Hormuz transit, keeping stagflation risk front and center across all assets.
tweet: Iran strikes on Kharg Island and a Fed dot-plot reset are the week's twin hammers — energy-driven inflation versus a softening labor market leaves Powell with nowhere to go.
